name: Crab Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 packet catsup or barbecue sauce, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the eggs and crab meat.
2. Add the grated cheddar cheese, diced green onion, mayonnaise, catsup or barbecue sauce, celery salt, onion salt, and garlic powder to a small bowl.
3. Stir until combined.
4. Mix in the sweet pickle juice.
5. Divide the mixture evenly between two hamburger buns.
6. Broil the burgers until they are bubbly or slightly brown.
7. Serve hot.
